text:
/ci1 2 チッ！　魔術士もいるのかよ。
面倒くせェな！

/ci1 2 ゲッテムハルト！
真っ直ぐ攻めると危険よ。
攻撃を避けて、間合いを詰めて！

/ci1 2 Dammit! There are sorcerers.
What a pain in the ass!

/ci1 2 Master Gettemhult! It's too dangerous to attack
them directly. Let's dodge their attacks and try
closing in on them!

チッ！　魔術士もいるのかよ。
面倒くせェな！

ゲッテムハルト！
真っ直ぐ攻めると危険よ。
攻撃を避けて、間合いを詰めて！

Dammit! There are sorcerers.
What a pain in the ass!

Master Gettemhult! It's too dangerous to attack
them directly. Let's dodge their attacks and try
closing in on them!
